lens3.title: Price-Trend Technical
lens3.sub: A trend-confirmation gauge — the signal that historically tells you a bear is actually underway, not just feared.

gauges.name: 50-day vs 150-day SMA
gauges.sub: Bear trigger: 50-day crosses below 150-day AND both flatten or slope down. The signal that historically tells you a bear is actually underway, not just feared.
gauges.detail: S&P ≈ 7,499. 50-day above 150-day (200-day ≈ 6,999); both slopes up. No death cross.
